markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review renewal terms and January content/performance.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Blocked:** Innerwell's budget is capped at $8k/mo, but GrowthX's core package is a non-negotiable $12k/mo. Innerwell also requested flexible renewal terms (quarterly/biannual).](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Traffic Doubled:** January blog traffic doubled to \~1,260 sessions/week, driven by the Ketamine cluster and successful PSEO landing page redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking Broken:** GA4 fails to distinguish CTA clicks from general page engagement, making it impossible to measure content ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**New Strategy Proposed:** A new "general mental health" content cluster (51 topics) was proposed to replicate the success of high-performing evergreen articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

## Topics

### Renewal & Budget

  - [**Innerwell Request:** Reduce monthly budget to $8k.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**GrowthX Position:** The $12k/mo core package is non-negotiable and cannot be itemized.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Innerwell Request:** Switch from annual to quarterly or biannual renewal for flexibility, citing past performance volatility.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Action:** Matt will present these requests to Andy but set expectations that a budget reduction is unlikely.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Ketamine Cluster:** Nearing completion with 3 articles left to refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Content updates only (SERP analysis, internal linking) → no URL changes.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**Exclusions:** Articles Innerwell uses for sharing were intentionally excluded.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**New Strategy: "General Mental Health" Cluster**](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Replicate the success of evergreen articles (e.g., "emotional safety") that consistently perform well.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Proposal:** 51 new topic assignments added to Airtable for Innerwell review.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive traffic to general mental health landing pages, with potential for specific service funnels.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Performance & Tracking

  - [**January Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Blog:** Doubled traffic to \~1,260 sessions/week.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** "Ketamine Laws by State" and evergreen articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Strong on top blogs (60–70% rate); learnings from lower-performing pieces will inform future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**PSEO Landing Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [**Redirects:** Successfully restored traffic to pre-URL-break levels.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**Top States:** Georgia, California, Texas.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Engagement on these pages remains low post-redirect and requires improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "Take the Assessment" CTA click is tracked as "user engagement" in GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Impact:** This event is indistinguishable from any other click on the page, preventing accurate ROI measurement for content.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Solution:** Create a unique, dedicated conversion event for the CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Mixpanel:** Innerwell also uses Mixpanel; a recurring report on editorial pages was requested to align on conversion metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [Present renewal requests ($8k budget, flexible terms) to Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [Research and recommend a GA4 event structure for tracking CTA clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Akina:**](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Review the 51 new "general mental health" topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Verify GA4 "purchase" event data accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Set up a recurring Mixpanel report for editorial pages.](https://fathom.video/share/C5U6GKAv5CSzaSegN9B1ZgT6baTc4h1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
